title: butania pantlingii
intro: Butania pantlingii is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the Himalayan forget-me-not. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Butania pantlingii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an anti-arthritic agent. Herbal preparations of Butania pantlingii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
